title: asplenium filix-femina var. retusa
intro: Asplenium filix-femina var. retusa, also known as the ladder spleenwort, is a type of fern native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of urinary problems. Herbal preparations of the ladder spleenwort can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
